title: Dragon Cave
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dragon Cave''' was located on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] near the [[Magister's Palace]]. Next to an underground glacier, it was steam-filled. [[Unidentified Magister|Magister Hal]] took [[Jabitha Hal|his daughter]] hiking there when she was little.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
